docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED MAR-09-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NGO, HOWARD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,400.00 FILED BY LIN, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT NGO, HOWARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MORGAN PRICKETT. FILED BY LIN, RICHARD NGO, HOWARD
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, RICHARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NGO, HOWARD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-20-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MORGAN PRICKETT. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---REBECCA CHAN. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MORGAN PRICKETT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
